prompt:
Ultra-realistic tech magazine cover featuring an elegant Korean woman in a sleek minimalist white tech-wear outfit — structured turtleneck and tailored trousers — holding a next-gen holographic-display smartphone up at chest level, its screen emitting a soft blue-cyan glow that illuminates her face. Flawless porcelain skin lit by the device's glow, sleek straight hair, minimal futuristic makeup with subtle metallic eyeliner. Background: seamless dark gunmetal studio with floating holographic UI elements and circuit-line light trails surrounding the phone. Bold "WIRED" masthead in clean modern sans-serif at top, with tech specs callout text along the side. 85mm lens, ultra-detailed device screen glow and skin lighting interaction, sharp focus, 8K photorealistic product tech editorial. 

Negative: blurry, cartoon, outdated tech design, watermark, distorted hands.
